title: Demote a stateless LiveComponent (stats panel)
prompt:
Write lib/my_app_web/components/stats_panel.ex (module MyAppWeb.StatsPanel). It must be a function component (Phoenix.Component), not a LiveComponent. stats_panel/1 with attrs :stats (list, required) and :title (string, default "Stats"). Render

{@title}

{s.label}: {s.value}
. No handle_event, no mount.
tier_rationale: One-step demotion of a stateless component. Canonical rule.
